mapper.insert: insert into homework ( title, content, course_id, teacher_id, publish_time, deadline, status ) values ( #{title}, #{content}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{publishTime}, #{deadline}, #{status} )
mapper.select: select h.id, h.title, c.course_name, u.real_name as teacher_name, h.deadline, h.status from homework h left join course c on h.course_id = c.id left join user u on h.teacher_id = u.id order by h.id desc
